extension.displayName: MoA Bridge - Mixture of Agents for Copilot
extension.description: Multi-LLM orchestration for VSCode Copilot Chat. Runs a 5-role pipeline (Planner → Recon → Refs → Aggregator → Actor) via the native vscode.lm API. Supports @moa chat participant, LM tools, and preset model groups.
moa.config.enableActorInLoop: Enable the Actor role in 5-role Loop mode (`@moa` chat participant). When **false** (default), Actor is skipped — Aggregator's `actor_needed` is downgraded to `recon_needed`. When **true**, Actor executes action_items via the acting agent loop (may write files, run terminal commands). Independent from `moa.enableActingAgent` (which controls single-shot Hermes mode in `moaRunner`).
moa.config.safeExecutionMode: v0.19.1: **Safe Executor** (default **true**). When enabled, Actor's tool calls are wrapped: `write_file`/`apply_patch`/`insert_edit`/`replace_string` operations back up the original file to `<target>.bak.<timestamp>` before execution; `delete`/`remove` operations move the file to `.moa_cache/<task_id>/_trash/` instead of actually deleting; all side-effecting actions are logged to `.moa_cache/<task_id>/manifest.json` with iter/seq/type/target/backup/status. When disabled, Actor executes tools directly without backup or manifest (NOT recommended).
moa.config.cacheTtlDays: v0.19.1: **Cache TTL** in days (default **30**). Tasks older than this will be cleaned up by the `MoA: Cleanup Old Tasks` command. Minimum 1, maximum 365.
moa.config.cacheRootDir: v0.19.1: **Cache root directory** override (default empty = use `<workspaceFolder>/.moa_cache/`). Set to an absolute path (e.g. `D:/moa_cache`) to centralize all MoA task caches across workspaces.
moa.config.executionPreset:
v0.20.0: **Top-level execution mode shortcut**. Pick a preset to cover the most common combinations of auto-execute + approval + safe-mode. Set to **custom** to control the three fine-grained configs below (autoExecuteAfterFinalize / approvalMode / safeExecutionMode) independently.

| Preset | Auto-execute after finalize? | Approval gate | SafeExecutor backup |
|---|---|---|---|
| **manual** (default) | ❌ Returns markdown only; user/main session must call `#moa_execute` | `batch` (Gate-A QuickPick) | ✅ |
| **supervised** | ✅ Auto-runs Actor | `batch` (Gate-A QuickPick multi-select per round) | ✅ |
| **autopilot** | ✅ Auto-runs Actor | `none` (zero human-in-the-loop) | ✅ (only safety net) |
| **yolo** | ✅ Auto-runs Actor | `none` | ❌ (no backup, irreversible) |
| **custom** | Controlled by `autoExecuteAfterFinalize` | Controlled by `approvalMode` | Controlled by `safeExecutionMode` |

**Recommended workflows**: `manual` for first-time / exploratory use; `supervised` for trusted but human-monitored tasks; `autopilot` for trusted CI/retry pipelines; `yolo` for sandboxed throwaway runs.

---

**v0.20.0：顶层执行模式快捷方式**。选择一个 preset 即可覆盖最常见的 autoExecute + approvalMode + safeMode 组合。设为 **custom** 可独立控制下方 3 个细粒度配置。

| Preset | finalize 后自动执行？ | 审批门 | SafeExecutor 备份 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **manual**（默认） | ❌ 只返回 markdown，需主会话/用户显式调用 `#moa_execute` | `batch`（Gate-A QuickPick） | ✅ |
| **supervised** | ✅ 自动执行 Actor | `batch`（每轮 Gate-A QuickPick 多选） | ✅ |
| **autopilot** | ✅ 自动执行 Actor | `none`（零人工介入） | ✅（唯一安全网） |
| **yolo** | ✅ 自动执行 Actor | `none` | ❌（无备份，不可逆） |
| **custom** | 由 `autoExecuteAfterFinalize` 控制 | 由 `approvalMode` 控制 | 由 `safeExecutionMode` 控制 |

**推荐用法**：`manual` 适合首次/探索性使用；`supervised` 适合有人值守的常规任务；`autopilot` 适合可信 CI/重试流水线；`yolo` 仅用于沙盒/一次性运行。
moa.config.autoExecuteAfterFinalize:
v0.20.0: When **true**, `finalizeTask()` automatically invokes Actor to execute `final.json`'s action_items (subject to `approvalMode`). When **false** (default), finalize returns markdown and the main session must call `#moa_execute` explicitly.

⚠️ Only effective when `executionPreset='custom'`. Other presets override this value.

---

v0.20.0：**true** = `finalizeTask()` 自动调用 Actor 执行 `final.json` 的 action_items（受 `approvalMode` 约束）。**false**（默认）= finalize 只返回 markdown，主会话需显式调用 `#moa_execute`。

⚠️ 仅在 `executionPreset='custom'` 时生效；其他 preset 会覆盖此值。
moa.config.approvalMode:
v0.20.0: **Approval gate mode** controlling how destructive Actor tool calls are gated.

| Mode | Behavior | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| **none** | No popups. Rely solely on SafeExecutor backup. | Combined with `safeMode=true` in `autopilot` preset. |
| **batch** (default) | Gate-A: at Actor entry, show QuickPick multi-select listing all action_items. User can deselect unwanted items. | Default for `manual` / `supervised` presets. |
| **per_call** | Gate-B: before EACH destructive tool call (`write_file` / `delete` / `execute`), show Yes/No/YesToAll/RejectAll dialog. | Fine-grained control over each operation. |
| **batch_plus_per_call** | Both gates — most conservative. Batch at entry + per-call before each destructive tool call. | Highest safety, lowest throughput. |

⚠️ Only effective when `executionPreset='custom'`. Other presets override this value.

---

v0.20.0：**审批门模式**，控制破坏性 Actor 工具调用在执行前如何被门控。

| 模式 | 行为 | 适用场景 |
|---|---|---|
| **none** | 不弹窗。完全依赖 SafeExecutor 备份。 | 与 `safeMode=true` 配合用于 `autopilot` preset。 |
| **batch**（默认） | Gate-A：Actor 入口弹 QuickPick 多选框，列出所有 action_items，可反选不想要的项。 | `manual` / `supervised` preset 的默认值。 |
| **per_call** | Gate-B：每个破坏性工具调用前（`write_file` / `delete` / `execute`）弹 Yes/No/YesToAll/RejectAll 对话框。 | 需要对每次操作细粒度控制时。 |
| **batch_plus_per_call** | 双门，最保守。入口批量 + 每次破坏性调用前都弹窗。 | 最高安全，最低吞吐。 |

⚠️ 仅在 `executionPreset='custom'` 时生效；其他 preset 会覆盖此值。
